name: ascii-graph-toolkit
description: CJK-width-aware ASCII/Unicode diagram & table toolkit — invoke BEFORE hand-drawing any CJK or ≥3-box ASCII diagram.

interface.shortDescription: CJK-width-aware ASCII/Unicode diagram & table generator for plain-text channels
interface.longDescription: Use ascii-graph-toolkit to render tables, flows, trees, bar charts, architecture, and sequence diagrams as plain text where Mermaid can't render — Claude Code terminals, Slack, PR descriptions. Deterministic pure-Python generators plus a wcwidth-based verify-loop that acts as an alignment oracle, so full-width CJK (中/日) characters stay aligned. Zero external binary.
defaultPrompt: Draw an ASCII flowchart of this pipeline.
Make a CJK-aligned comparison table for the terminal.
Render this architecture as a plain-text diagram for the PR.
